name: Mueang Uthai Thani riverfront civic core
notes: Primary urban band covering city center, hospital, market/civic trips, and dense local demand in Mueang Uthai Thani.

name: Wat Tha Sung and city-south leisure band
notes: Temple-led destination activity and southern city fringe demand around Wat Tha Sung and connected local trips.

name: Nong Chang service axis
notes: District service and hospital-centered activity in Nong Chang, suitable for preserving non-city demand in the southwest side of the province.

name: Ban Rai-Lan Sak outer service band
notes: Outer-district service and tourism-support band linking Ban Rai, Lan Sak, Hup Pa Tat, and west/northwest field-survey coverage.
